name: cors-reflected-origin
note: An endpoint that reflects the request Origin into Access-Control-Allow-Origin AND allows credentials — any site can then read the authenticated response.

probe.strategy: Replay the request adding Origin: https://evil.example. Inspect Access-Control-Allow-Origin and Access-Control-Allow-Credentials. Reflecting an arbitrary Origin with credentials:true is exploitable; also try Origin: null and trusted-suffix bypasses (evil-trusted.app).
probe.signal: Access-Control-Allow-Origin reflects the attacker Origin while Allow-Credentials is true.
